preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Habitify API Key
preferences.description: Create it in Habitify Settings > API. Required for all commands.

preferences.name: rowColorMode
preferences.title: Row Color Mode
preferences.description: Choose how Raycast should tint habit rows.

commands.name: index
commands.title: Today Habits
commands.description: View and manage today's Habitify habits.

commands.name: current-time-of-day
commands.title: Current Time of Day
commands.description: Show habits scheduled for the current time slot.

commands.name: today-stats
commands.title: Today Stats
commands.description: View today's overview metrics and streaks.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
